goals.name: audit
goals.description: Executes HexaGlue architecture audit and quality analysis. This mojo runs audit plugins to analyze code quality, architecture compliance, and generates reports in various formats (console, HTML, JSON, Markdown)

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: errorOnBlocker
parameters.description: Treat BLOCKER violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnBlocker setting

parameters.name: errorOnCritical
parameters.description: Treat CRITICAL violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnCritical setting

parameters.name: failOnError
parameters.description: Fail the Maven build when audit errors are found. Overrides the YAML failOnError setting

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain

parameters.name: reportDirectory
parameters.description: Output directory for audit reports. Reports are generated by the audit plugin (DddAuditPlugin) in the audit/ subdirectory

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue audit execution

goals.name: generate
goals.description: Executes HexaGlue analysis and code generation. Usage in pom.xml: <plugin> <groupId>io.hexaglue</groupId> <artifactId>hexaglue-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain. When enabled, the build will fail if any domain types cannot be classified with sufficient confidence

parameters.name: outputDirectory
parameters.description: Output directory for generated sources

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue execution

parameters.name: skipValidation
parameters.description: Skip validation step before generation. When true, generation will proceed even if there are unclassified types

parameters.name: tolerantResolution
parameters.description: Enable tolerant type resolution for projects using annotation processors. When enabled, HexaGlue accepts unresolved types during analysis instead of failing

goals.name: generate-and-audit
goals.description: Executes both HexaGlue code generation and audit in a single step. This mojo combines the functionality of hexaglue:generate and hexaglue:audit goals, running both analysis and code generation followed by quality audit

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: errorOnBlocker
parameters.description: Treat BLOCKER violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnBlocker setting

parameters.name: errorOnCritical
parameters.description: Treat CRITICAL violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnCritical setting

parameters.name: failOnError
parameters.description: Fail the Maven build when audit errors are found. Overrides the YAML failOnError setting

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain

parameters.name: outputDirectory
parameters.description: Output directory for generated sources

parameters.name: reportDirectory
parameters.description: Output directory for audit reports. Reports are generated by the audit plugin (DddAuditPlugin) in the audit/ subdirectory

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue execution

parameters.name: tolerantResolution
parameters.description: Enable tolerant type resolution for projects using annotation processors. When enabled, HexaGlue accepts unresolved types during analysis instead of failing

goals.name: reactor-audit
goals.description: Executes HexaGlue architecture audit across all modules in a multi-module reactor. This aggregator mojo runs once at the reactor root, analyzes sources from all jar-packaged modules, and produces a single aggregated audit report

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: errorOnBlocker
parameters.description: Treat BLOCKER violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnBlocker setting

parameters.name: errorOnCritical
parameters.description: Treat CRITICAL violations as audit errors. Overrides the YAML errorOnCritical setting

parameters.name: failOnError
parameters.description: Fail the Maven build when audit errors are found. Overrides the YAML failOnError setting

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain

parameters.name: reportDirectory
parameters.description: Output directory for audit reports

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue audit execution

parameters.name: tolerantResolution
parameters.description: Enable tolerant type resolution for projects using annotation processors. When enabled, HexaGlue accepts unresolved types during analysis instead of failing

goals.name: reactor-generate
goals.description: Executes HexaGlue analysis and code generation across all modules in a multi-module reactor. This aggregator mojo runs once at the reactor root, analyzes sources from all jar-packaged modules, builds a unified architectural model, and routes generated code to the appropriate module output directories

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain

parameters.name: outputDirectory
parameters.description: Default output directory for generated sources (reactor-level)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue execution

parameters.name: skipValidation
parameters.description: Skip validation step before generation

parameters.name: tolerantResolution
parameters.description: Enable tolerant type resolution for projects using annotation processors. When enabled, HexaGlue accepts unresolved types during analysis instead of failing

goals.name: validate
goals.description: Validates domain type classifications before code generation. This mojo analyzes the codebase and generates a validation report showing: * EXPLICIT - Types with jMolecules annotations or explicit configuration * INFERRED - Types classified by structural analysis with high confidence * UNCLASSIFIED - Ambiguous types requiring user intervention When failOnUnclassified is true, the build fails if any types remain unclassified, encouraging explicit classification via jMolecules annotations or hexaglue.yaml configuration

parameters.name: basePackage
parameters.description: The base package to analyze. Types outside this package are ignored

parameters.name: failOnUnclassified
parameters.description: Whether to fail the build if unclassified types remain. When enabled, the build will fail if any domain types cannot be classified with sufficient confidence

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip HexaGlue validation

parameters.name: validationReportPath
parameters.description: Output path for the validation report file. If specified, a Markdown report will be written to this location in addition to the console output
